title: Packet 037 And Packet 038 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 037 JSON closure, Packet 037 closure handoff, Packet 038 planning closure, Packet 039 draft authority, routing updates, and roadmap updates through the parent-root publication boundary, then fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` without opening the selected second source/test host trial.
dependency_note: Packet 038 selected the operations-web apparatus resource explorer clear-state source/test slice as the next bounded trial candidate, but host-side execution must remain closed until the Packet 037 and Packet 038 local authority surfaces are published and synchronized to `/home/olares/code/apex`.

Current old-clone branch, commit, and status count at `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`
Packet 037 handoff and Packet 038 handoff/JSON authority surfaces
Routing and roadmap updates naming Packet 039 as the only next packet

No selected apparatus source/test trial execution, no source edits beyond authority documents, no package or lockfile mutation, no dependency install, no package-manager activation/download, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no migration approval, and no old-clone mutation

Stage only Packet 037 JSON closure plus Packet 037 closure handoff, Packet 038 closure, Packet 039 draft authority, routing, and roadmap files required for publication.
Commit and push only the bounded authority set without remote rewrite.

Verify `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at the published commit and contains Packet 037 through Packet 039 authority artifacts.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, source/test execution, remote rewrite, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 039 is prepared because Packet 038 selected a bounded second source/test host-trial slice but found the Packet 037 JSON closure, Packet 037 closure handoff, and Packet 038 authority still absent from `/home/olares/code/apex`.
